titleStmt.title: SII 23.476: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 476. (A.R. No. 476 of 1907.) Rishiyūr, Tirutturaippundi Taluk, Tanjavur District Kailāsanātha temple—on the north wall. Kulōttuṅga III: year 33: 1211 A.D.

summary.p: The king is called Tribhuvanavīradēva ‘who took Madurai etc, The details of date are given as Mīna, ba, 13, Monday, Pūraṭṭādi yielding the equivalent A.D. 1211, March 14: f.d.n. 19. This is stated to be a renewal deed (puṉapramāṇa-iśaivutīṭṭu) given by Arayaṉ Tiruvāṉaikkāvuḍaiyāṉ alias Malaiyappiyarāyaṉ of Perumūr in Veṇṇikkūṟṟam, a division of Śuttamali-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkāvuḍaiyār at that place (Perumūr), by which he confirmed the gift of 4 vēli of land (out of seven situated at Piḻiśūr) which he had made in the 30th year of the king for the expenses of worship in that temple. The supporting document for that grant having been worn out (and lost) in the meanwhile the tānattār of the temple applied to him for another authority. The seven vēli of land is said to have been the strīdhana of the donor's deceased wife Arayaṉ Āḷavandāḷ from her father Kaḷattūr Kiḻavaṉ Tillaiyuḷvilli Periyāḻvār alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Vāṇakōvaraiyar and to have become his property by marriage. Of the remaining 3 vēli, two are said to have been presented by him to Brāhmaṇas as śrādaha-dāna in memory of his wife, half a vēli for worship of god Periya-Nāyaṉār installed in the temple of Tiruvagattiśvaramuḍaiyār at Piḻiśūr by Vāṇakōvaraiyar's wife (donor's mother-in-law) and 3 mā and odd of land for worship of goddess Sarasvatiyār consecrated by Vāṇakōvaraiyar himself. The gift to the two deities in the temple evidently accounts for the existence of this comprehensive grant at this place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭit talaiyum koṇṭu virar Apiṣekamum vijayar Abhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaru ḷiya tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattumuṉṟāvatu miṉa ṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nāḷ cuttamali vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇikkūṟṟattu perumūruṭaiyān Arayaṉ tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyāṉāṉa malaiyappiyarāyaṉeṉ puṉapra
māṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . Ivvūril Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇḍecura tevar kaṉmikaḷukku puṉapramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṉ pāri kaḷattūrkiḻavaṉ Arayaṉ Āḷavaṉtāḷ taṉ pitā kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ tillaiyuḷvilli periyāḻvārāna kulot tuṅkacoḻa vāṇakovaraiyar pakkal ḷaṉnāṭṭuppāmpuṇik kūṟṟattu piḻicūril citaṉam peṟṟu Uṭaiyaḷāy Ivaḷ pāhattuk kannyādānattā
l Ennutā Icainta nilam Eḻuveli Innilam Eḻuveliyil Ivaḷu kku śrāttadānamāka brāhmaṇaṟkuk kuṭutta pottakappaṭi nilam Iraṇ ṭe cinṉam nikki Ivaḷukku naṉṟāka piḻicūril tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ tillaiyuḷ villi periyāḻvārāṉa kulot tuṅka coḻa vāṇakovaraiyan pāriyai Ātavattūruṭaiyāṉ māte van nitiyāḻvāṉ mutaliyāṟku naṉṟāka Eḻuntaruḷivi
tta periya nāyaṉāṟku pūcaikku Uṭalākak kuṭutta pottakappaṭi nilam Araiyum Ikkoyilil kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ Araiyaṉ tillaiyuḷvilli yāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa vāṇakovaraiyan Eḻuttaruḷuvitta sarasvatiyāṟkup pūcaikku Uṭalāka kuṭutta pottakappaṭi nilam muṉ ṟumāccinṉamum nikkip perumuruṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār pūcai kku Uṭalāka kuṭutta ni
lam nālveli Innilam nālveliyum muppatāvatu mutal kuṭuttu Anu pokittu varukaiyil Innilattukku ciṉna pramāṇam vaitta Iṭatte jirṇitta teṉṟum Innilattukku puṉapramāṇam paṇṇittaraveṇu meṉṟu tānattār paṇitta pramāṇappaṭiyey pottakappaṭi nilam nāl veliyum muṉpu Innāyanāṟku pūjaikku Uṭalāka nirvā ṟtu kuṭuttapaṭiye
Innilam nālveliyum Iṉnilavopāti Iṟaiyili nattavopātiyum Uḷ nilattukku menokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkina kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eṟp(o)ṟpaṭṭa pākāciriya Urimaikaḷum nirnilaiyum Iṉnāyaṉāṟku tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭuttu Aṉupokittu varukiṟapaṭiye tiruṉāmattuk kāṇi kuṭuttu puṉapramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutten Ip perumūr Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkā
uṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku perumūruṭai yāṉ Arayaṉ tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyā nāṉa malaiyappiyarāyaṉeṉ Ivar Aruḷicceyya Ippuṉakhramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ Ip piḻicūṟ karaṇattān Āvaṇamuṭaiyān tiruvātavuṭaiyān civāsude- vaneṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi sammatittu Ippottakappaṭi nilam nālve liyuṅ kuṭuttu Ikkoyilile
kalveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku Ivai perumuruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tiruvāṉai kkā Uṭaiyāṉāṉa malaiyappiyarāyaneṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumūruṭaiyān Arayaṉ viracoḻaṉāṉa teṉṉavaṉ viḻupparaiya ṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ Arayaṉ tillaiyuḷ villiyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ Arayaṉ
tirumākāḷa muṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ Arayaṉ tāyapirāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai teṅkaṅkuṭaiyan Irā carācatevanāṉa Aḻakiya coḻaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu:
Digital edition of SII 23.476 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
